lanes.goal: define and implement provider incident recovery record/audit
lanes.stop_condition: stop if hidden resume authority can pass

lanes.goal: explain incident recovery value without claiming production recovery performance
lanes.expected_output: capability delta, product value evidence, release notes
lanes.stop_condition: stop if users may read v9.5 as live production incident recovery proof

join_packet.conflict_summary: No unresolved lane conflict; both lanes require incident recovery to remain drill evidence.
join_packet.blocker_summary: No active blocker after recovery and capability evidence are present.
join_packet.merge_rationale: Runtime contract and product framing are joined by the incident recovery artifact and capability delta.

not_proven: Parallel lane evidence does not prove live provider recovery, credential safety, billing safety, or market adoption.
